top_tweets.text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX
top_tweets.author: claudeai
top_tweets.name: Claude
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，讓使用者透過對話即可製作原型、簡報與文件，由 Claude Opus 4.7 視覺模型驅動，目前對 Pro 以上方案開放研究預覽。

top_tweets.text: honest question. if everyone’s using AI for design, won’t things start to look the same after a point?
top_tweets.author: Ahmedcreatives
top_tweets.name: Ahmed
top_tweets.summary_zh: 提問：當所有人都用 AI 做設計時，產出的東西是否會逐漸趨同？引發對 AI 設計工具長期影響的討論。

top_tweets.text:
product management tip: ragebaiting your user base/player base by making inaccurate claims about the quality of your systems is an incredibly fast way of identifying current problems with your software that you can then prioritize fixes for

easily the top reason I’m on here
top_tweets.author: drewlevin
top_tweets.name: Drew Levin
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品管理技巧：透過刻意發布「不精確的系統品質聲明」激怒用戶，能快速辨識出產品當前問題並排定修復優先序。作者表示這是他使用社群媒體的主要原因。

top_tweets.text:
The AI debate is difficult because one side views art as a product to be delivered as fast as possible. 

It's like going to a lake and telling fisherman that it's "more efficient" to buy fish from the grocery store. They aren't just there for the fish.
top_tweets.author: sean_gause
top_tweets.name: Sean // Hear Tell of Hauntings🥀
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 辯論的核心分歧在於一方將創作視為「需盡快交付的產品」，就像告訴釣魚者「去超市買魚更有效率」——忽略了過程本身的價值。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic's Chief Product Officer sat on Figma's board.

Figma integrated Claude as their AI assistant.

On Monday he resigned from Figma. 

The same day, reports surfaced that Anthropic was building design tools.

Yesterday Anthropic launched Claude Design.

A direct Figma
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席產品長曾任 Figma 董事，週一辭職當天傳出 Anthropic 正開發設計工具，隔日即發布 Claude Design，時間點引發對競業關係的討論。

top_tweets.text: there are likely ~100 ppl alive today that deeply understand all of these together: product instinct, what makes good software, design, technical depth, a real model of ai, the psychology of a single user, the shape of culture, team building, the ability to motivate, & the
top_tweets.author: signulll
top_tweets.name: signüll
top_tweets.summary_zh: 全球真正同時深度理解產品直覺、軟體品質、設計、技術深度、AI 模型、使用者心理、文化形態、團隊建立與激勵能力的人可能不到 100 位。

top_tweets.text:
Introducing our new collaboration with Anthropic: Canva is now in Claude Design! Generate ideas in Claude. Edit in Canva. No friction. No starting from scratch. 
https://t.co/f220BR4AZk https://t.co/tLHHLd1rO3
top_tweets.author: canva
top_tweets.name: Canva
top_tweets.summary_zh: Canva 與 Anthropic 合作，現已整合進 Claude Design；使用者可在 Claude 生成創意後直接在 Canva 編輯，無需從零開始。

top_tweets.text: Design, edit, animate. @cavalry__app is now completely free with your Canva account 🎉 Motion has become a core part of modern brand work, and now you've got photo editing, vector design, layout, and 2D animation all under one roof with one login. https://t.co/om5rqVyMbr
top_tweets.author: Affinity
top_tweets.name: Affinity
top_tweets.summary_zh: Affinity 宣布 2D 動畫工具 Cavalry 現已完全免費提供給 Canva 帳戶用戶，讓照片編輯、向量設計、排版與動畫整合在單一平台。

top_tweets.text:
Made this 30 second video of Claude Design just by pasting in the Claude Design blog post and some tweets from @AnthropicAI employees

Kinda speechless. https://t.co/9uFxO3LKzf
top_tweets.author: petergyang
top_tweets.name: Peter Yang
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者只貼入 Claude Design 部落格文章與幾則推文，就讓 Claude Design 生成了一支 30 秒介紹影片，對成果感到震撼。

top_tweets.author: UiSavior
top_tweets.name: UI/UX Savior
top_tweets.summary_zh: 整理六個免費學習 UI 設計的網站，涵蓋動態效果、設計模式、A/B 測試、靈感來源、拆解分析與 UI 元件資源。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
